title: Stefan's Enchanted Books
description: Unique textures for each enchanted book in the game! Works without Optifine/Citresewn!
body:
# Stefan's Enchanted Books, By StefanJ2_
**Download from the [official website](https://bettervanillabuilding.com/):**

## What to expect
Bored of every enchanted book having the same texture on it? Say no more! Stefan's enchanted books will change your boring old book textures to easily recognisable and fun looking designs! 

![books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/851e651f2d70eee1e5019c7337645a624f83a412.jpeg)

### Use it in vanilla
Use the resourcepack in vanilla with the [Enchanted Book Enabler Datapack](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/enchantedbookenabler-datapack)
### Use it with mods
Use the resourcepack with mods when using [Optifine](https://optifine.net/) or [Citresewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions)


## Get your own Minecraft Server
[![Shockbyte](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9360084db5b7016f32cdf6978d0ca72c50b5d351.png)](https://shockbyte.com/partner/stefanj2_)
